description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Snowballs: CI / CD that runs on push to core4, feature/* branches and on pull requests to core4, and also on completion of NeL: CI / CD workflow. The workflow has three jobs: strings, build, and docker. The strings job sets reusable strings, the build job builds the project on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04, and the docker job builds and pushes a Docker image.
